title: Profiles And Launcher Polish
notes: The launcher now starts in fullscreen and the onboarding intro includes a direct language picker.
Profiles were reworked into cleaner sidebar popouts with profile-specific pinned games, quick search history, library filters, groups, streaks, and update notices.
Favorite game selection is now limited to titles that are actually in your library, so profile focus stays relevant.
The About page hero card and several empty states were redesigned for a more polished Lumorix look.
DropDash now ships with its own updated native icon instead of falling back to a generic launcher-style symbol.
